name: Tim Robinson
blurb: Creator of the cult Netflix series I Think You Should Leave.
bio: Tim Robinson is an American comedian and writer, a former Saturday Night Live cast member and writer who created and stars in the Netflix sketch series I Think You Should Leave, a touchstone of absurdist, escalation-driven comedy.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
